title: Legendary Maces
description: A minecraft plugin that adds 5 new Legendary and overpowered maces to the game!
body:
# CORE Adds 5 new Legendary Maces to the game that each have their own abbilities! # Maces ## Heavenly Mace **Density 5, Breach 1, Windburst 1** Ability: ( Right Click): Thor! Summon 1 lightning strike that does 2.5 hearts guaranteed and 3 other smaller lightning strikes! (CD = 60 seconds) Ability: (Shift + Right Click) Escapist! Grants the user speed 10 and jump boost 10 for 2 seconds to be able to escape (CD = 60 seconds) Passive: Jump boost 2 ## Hell Mace **Density 5, Breach 1, Wind Burst 1** Ability (Right Click): FIREBALL! Launch a Ghast Fireball that pierces through enemy armor, dealing at least 3 hearts of damage. (CD = 60 seconds) Ability (Shift + Right Click): HELL! Stun your enemy with Blindness and Slowness 100 for 2 seconds while buffing yourself with strenght and speed for also 2 seconds. (CD = 90 seconds) Passive: Infinite Fire Resistance and Jump Boost 2. ## Bedrock Mace **Density 5, Breach 4, Wind Burst 1** Ability (Right Click): TANK! Gain Resistance 2 for 3 seconds to absorb incoming damage. (CD = 40 seconds) Ability (Shift + Right Click): WARRIOR! Enter a rage state, gaining Strength 5 for 2 seconds. (CD = 60 seconds) Passive: Unbreakable and unyielding. ## Lunge-Hardened Mace **Density 6, Breach 1, Wind Burst 1** Ability (Right Click): LUNGE! Dash through the air towards your enemies, but still take fall damage!. (CD = 5 seconds) Ability (Shift + Right Click): MEGA JUMP! Leap high into the air and crash down, knocking enemies back, with 0 risk of fall damage. (CD = 60 seconds) Passive: Speed 2. ## Demi-God Mace **Density 7, Breach 5, Wind Burst 1** Ability (Right Click): INSTANT MACE! Your next hit deals devastating damage as if falling from high up ( next hit feels like a mace hit from 10 blocks up even if you hit someone from the ground ). (CD = 90 seconds) Ability (Shift + Right Click): INVINCIBILITY! Become temporarily immortal ( 3 seconds ) with regeneration and absorption. (CD = 360 seconds) Passive: Strength 2, Speed 2, Fire Resistance, Jump Boost 2, and CHEAT DEATH ( totem of undying but way better ) (2 Hour CD). # Crafting All crafting recipes are shown in gallery! # ResourcePack Download it from GreenHeartZ! a fellow creator wich I collabed with!
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/legendary-maces-resource-pack
